steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage describes Chicago’s public art as ranging from monumental sculptures to innovative street murals, then says the ______ public art “can satisfy any art lover.” The blank must capture the wide range that allows every type of lover to be satisfied.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘controversy over’: debate about the art would not be what satisfies any art lover. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘breadth of’: means the wide range or variety of. A broad variety — from sculpture to street art — is precisely what satisfies every type of art lover. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘apathy toward’: means indifference. Indifference would not satisfy art lovers; this contradicts the passage’s positive framing. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘confusion about’: confusion would not satisfy anyone. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
